592 
593         return f"""# --- {t.upper()} Routes ---
594 
595 @router.get("/{t}", tags=["{t}"])
596 async def list_{t}(limit: int = 50, offset: int = 0, db = Depends(get_db)):
597     rows = db.execute("SELECT * FROM {t} LIMIT ? OFFSET ?", (limit, offset)).fetchall()
598     return {{"data": [dict(r) for r in rows], "total": db.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {t}").fetchone()[0]}}
599 
600 @router.get("/{t}/{{item_id}}", tags=["{t}"])
601 async def get_{t[:-1]}(item_id: str, db = Depends(get_db)):
602     row = db.execute("SELECT * FROM {t} WHERE {pk_col} = ?", (item_id,)).fetchone()
603     if not row:
604         raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="{t[:-1]} not found")
605     return dict(row)
606 
607 @router.post("/{t}", tags=["{t}"], status_code=201)
608 async def create_{t[:-1]}(data: Dict[str, Any], db = Depends(get_db)):
609     item_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
610     data["{pk_col}"] = item_id
611     cols = ", ".join(data.keys())
612     placeholders = ", ".join("?" for _ in data)
613     db.execute(f"INSERT INTO {t} ({{cols}}) VALUES ({{placeholders}})", list(data.values()))
614     db.commit()
615     return {{"id": item_id, "message": "Created successfully"}}
616 
617 @router.put("/{t}/{{item_id}}", tags=["{t}"])
618 async def update_{t[:-1]}(item_id: str, data: Dict[str, Any], db = Depends(get_db)):
619     data.pop("{pk_col}", None)
620     if not data:
621         raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="No data provided")
622     set_clause = ", ".join(f"{{k}} = ?" for k in data)
623     db.execute(f"UPDATE {t} SET {{set_clause}} WHERE {pk_col} = ?", [*data.values(), item_id])
624     db.commit()
625     return {{"message": "Updated successfully"}}
626 
627 @router.delete("/{t}/{{item_id}}", tags=["{t}"])
628 async def delete_{t[:-1]}(item_id: str, db = Depends(get_db)):
629     db.execute("DELETE FROM {t} WHERE {pk_col} = ?", (item_id,))
630     db.commit()
631     return {{"message": "Deleted successfully"}}
632 """
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

694     def _ein_instructions(self, company_name: str) -> str:
695         return f"""
696 EIN APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS FOR {company_name}
697 
698 Method 1 — Online (Fastest, Recommended):
699 1. Go to: https://www.irs.gov/businesses/small-businesses-self-employed/apply-for-an-employer-identification-number-ein-online
700 2. Select "Limited Liability Company" as entity type
701 3. Complete the online interview (15-20 minutes)
702 4. EIN issued IMMEDIATELY upon completion
703 5. Print/save the confirmation letter (CP 575)
704 
705 Method 2 — IRS Form SS-4 (Mail/Fax):
706 1. Download Form SS-4 from irs.gov
707 2. Complete all fields:
708    - Line 1: {company_name}
709    - Line 2: Trade name (if different)
710    - Line 4a: Mailing address
711    - Line 7a/b: Responsible party name and SSN
712    - Line 9a: Type of entity (Limited liability company)
713    - Line 9b: Number of members
714    - Line 10: Reason for applying (Started new business)
715    - Line 11: Date business started
716 3. Fax to: (855) 641-6935 (receives EIN in ~4 business days)
717 4. Mail to: IRS, Cincinnati, OH 45999 (4-5 weeks)
718 
719 Important Notes:
720 - The EIN is free — never pay a third party to obtain one
721 - You need an EIN before opening a business bank account
722 - Use the EIN for all business tax filings and documents
723 - An EIN does not expire
724 """.strip()

681 HOW TO FUND YOUR REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST
682 {trust_name}
683 
684 CRITICAL: A Living Trust only protects assets that are IN the trust.
685 An unfunded trust does NOT avoid probate. Complete this checklist!
686 
687 REAL ESTATE:
688 - Prepare a new deed transferring property FROM "[Your Name]"
689   TO "[Your Name], Trustee of {trust_name}, dated {date}"
690 - Record the deed with the county recorder's office (fee: $15-$50 per property)
691 - Notify your title insurance company and mortgage servicer
692 - Obtain a new Certificate of Trust to provide to title companies
693 - See Lady Bird deed or TOD deed options if available in {state}
694 
695 FINANCIAL ACCOUNTS:
696 - Contact each bank/credit union/brokerage
697 - Request account title change to: "{trust_name}, dated {date},
698   [Your Name], Trustee"
699 - Bring Certificate of Trust to bank branch
700 - Some institutions require their own form
701 - Alternative: Add Trust as POD (payable on death) beneficiary
702 
703 RETIREMENT ACCOUNTS (IRA, 401k, 403b):
704 - DO NOT retitle retirement accounts in trust name — this is a taxable event!
705 - Instead, update BENEFICIARY DESIGNATIONS:
706   Primary: Spouse (if married)
707   Contingent: {trust_name}
708 
709 LIFE INSURANCE:
710 - Update beneficiary designation:
711   Primary: Spouse (if married)
712   Contingent: {trust_name}
713 - If estate tax planning: Consider Irrevocable Life Insurance Trust (ILIT)
714 
715 VEHICLES:
716 - Generally NOT worth titling in trust (insurance complications)
717 - Exception: Classic cars, boats, aircraft of significant value
718 - Alternative: Add beneficiary or use TOD title if available in {state}
719 
720 BUSINESS INTERESTS:
721 - Transfer LLC membership interest or corporate stock to Trust
722 - Amend Operating Agreement or stock ledger
723 - Issue new membership certificate or stock certificate to Trust
724 
725 PERSONAL PROPERTY:
726 - Execute an Assignment of Personal Property to Trust
727 - Comprehensive personal property transfers to Trust collectively
728 
729 ANNUAL MAINTENANCE:
730 - Review trust funding after major asset purchases or dispositions
731 - Update Trust if family circumstances change (birth, death, divorce)
732 - Trust amendment must be notarized in most states
